top_stories.title: Philex sets Silangan mine opening by Q3
top_stories.summary: Pangilinan-led Philex Mining Corp. expects to begin commercial operations of its Silangan project by the third quarter, barring any further delays in the completion of the processing plant.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This is a strong editorial signal because it shows technology moving into real-world deployment at scale. It points to traction beyond experimentation.
